blockingIssues.description: The new reconnect path can race the initial Codex handshake and send a second initialize request on the same subprocess if the operator submits before startup finishes, breaking the first post-launch action.
Issue list route sync bypasses the shared manual-switch guard and can revert a manual company switch back to the stale route company before remembered-path navigation completes.
Issue detail repeats the same direct route-sync write and can likewise snap the operator back to the old company during a manual switch from a deep-linked issue page.

Making `/api/heartbeat-runs/:runId/events` and `/api/heartbeat-runs/:runId/log` board-only breaks the shipped `papierklammer heartbeat run` agent-authenticated flow, which polls those endpoints after wakeup to stream run output.

appliedUpdates.description: Updated `.factory/library/architecture.md` to document the shipped CLI heartbeat runner as a runtime consumer of heartbeat-run detail endpoints and to note that cross-surface run-summary extraction must preserve structured error summaries.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: When syncing selected company from a company-prefixed route, reuse the shared route-sync guard helper instead of writing direct `setSelectedCompanyId(..., { source: "route_sync" })` effects in page components.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The review for `web-company-context-and-orchestrator-visibility` found blocking regressions in both `ui/src/pages/Issues.tsx` and `ui/src/pages/IssueDetail.tsx` because they bypassed `shouldSyncCompanySelectionFromRoute()` and reverted manual company switches mid-navigation.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Allow a gap-analysis plus targeted regression-patch flow for partial-hardening follow-ups where most of the feature already landed, instead of always requiring a strict tests-first-red sequence.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The `backend-orchestrator-action-contracts` worker handoff recorded a justified deviation from the current tests-first step for a narrow follow-up patch, and the review echoed that the current skill text does not fit this class of mission work well.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document a stable public-API seeding fallback for deterministic demo-repo work when the onboarding wizard becomes unreliable during validation.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The `run-identity-and-tui-output` handoff described a justified deviation to API-based seeding, and the reviewer noted that this fallback is not captured in the current audit-worker procedure.

rejectedObservations.observation: Create additional guidance for duplicated `/api/orchestrator/status` types across server, TUI, and console.
rejectedObservations.reason: Rejected as already substantially covered by the existing AGENTS.md contract-sync rule; the review points to a code cleanup opportunity, but it does not yet show a guidance gap distinct from the repo's current synchronization guidance.
